basic_details.job_title: BRIC ILS Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: BRIC Institute of Life Sciences (BRIC ILS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Scientific Positions Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: The last date of receiving a complete application is 30 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in Employment News

age_limit.age_details: Scientist-D: 45 years, Scientist-C: 40 years, Scientist-B: 35 years
age_limit.details: Scientist-D: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Scientist-C: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Scientist-B: Maximum age limit is 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./equivalent degree with research experience, Ph.D. degree with research experience.
qualification.details: Scientist-D: 1st class in M.Sc./equivalent degree with at least 9 years of research experience. Desirable: Ph.D. degree with at least 5 years of research experience. Scientist-C: 1st Class in M.Sc./equivalent with at least 5 years of research experience. Desirable: Ph.D. degree with at least 3 years of research experience. Scientist-B: 1st Class in M.Sc. / equivalent, having 3 years of research experience in the relevant field. Desirable: Ph.D. with 1 year of research experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Scientist-D: Rs.78,800/- to Rs.2,09,200/-, Scientist-C: Rs.67,700/- to Rs.2,08,700/-, Scientist-B: Rs.56,100/- to Rs.1,77,500/-

selection_process: Screening and Selection Committee decision on quality and impact of publications and patents Assessment/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC ILS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
The last date of receiving a complete application is 30 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in Employment News.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BRIC ILS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download BRIC ILS Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.bric_institute_of_life_sciences: Scientist-D: Rs.78,800/- to Rs.2,09,200/-, Scientist-C: Rs.67,700/- to Rs.2,08,700/-, Scientist-B: Rs.56,100/- to Rs.1,77,500/-
M.Sc./equivalent degree with research experience, Ph.D. degree with research experience.

content_sections.heading: BRIC ILS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BRIC ILS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BRIC ILS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BRIC ILS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientist-D: 1st class in M.Sc./equivalent degree with at least 9 years of research experience. Desirable: Ph.D. degree with at least 5 years of research experience. Scientist-C: 1st Class in M.Sc./equivalent with at least 5 years of research experience. Desirable: Ph.D. degree with at least 3 years of research experience. Scientist-B: 1st Class in M.Sc. / equivalent, having 3 years of research experience in the relevant field. Desirable: Ph.D. with 1 year of research experience.

content_sections.heading: BRIC ILS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Scientist-D: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Scientist-C: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Scientist-B: Maximum age limit is 35 years.

rows.date: The last date of receiving a complete application is 30 days from the date of publication of the advertisement in Employment News

content_sections.heading: BRIC ILS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening and Selection Committee decision on quality and impact of publications and patents Assessment/Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BRIC ILS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BRIC ILS Scientific Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BRIC ILS Scientific Positions is 24 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for Scientist-B posts?
faq.answer: For Scientist-B posts, candidates need a 1st Class in M.Sc. / equivalent with 3 years of research experience. A Ph.D. with 1 year of research experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, women candidates and candidates from SC/ST category are exempt from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Scientist-D?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Scientist-D position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BRIC ILS recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of BRIC ILS on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these scientific positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a screening based on publications and patents, followed by an assessment and interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for Scientist-C?
faq.answer: The salary for Scientist-C ranges from Rs.67,700/- to Rs.2,08,700/- per month, corresponding to Pay Level-11.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q9. Does BRIC ILS offer full-time positions?
faq.answer: Yes, all the Scientific Positions advertised by BRIC ILS are full-time roles.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies have been announced for the Scientific Positions at BRIC ILS.
